headline: Cincinnati Financial (CINF) Surges 3.6%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Cincinnati Financial (CINF) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
